title: neanotis formosana
intro: Neanotis formosana, also known as Formosa blue beard, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Taiwan and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neanotis formosana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. Neanotis formosana can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or extract, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
